title: Account access failures look malicious but trace back to time drift
incident_summary: Login failures and nonce mismatches resemble abuse, but the surrounding service evidence points elsewhere.

alerts.title: Nonce mismatch spike
alerts.content: OAuth nonce mismatch alerts climbed to 33% of auth attempts.

alerts.title: Bruteforce detector warning
alerts.content: Anomaly detector reports elevated failed logins from mixed IP ranges.

alerts.title: Session cache latency
alerts.content: Session cache latency +20ms, no major error increase.

logs.title: Clock skew on auth-node-7
logs.content: auth-node-7 clock drifted +97 seconds; nonce validity checks failing.

logs.title: NTP daemon stopped
logs.content: ntpd service exited on auth-node-7 after base image update.

logs.title: Password failures mixed traffic
logs.content: failed password attempts distributed normally across pods.

runbook_snippets.title: Clock skew recovery
runbook_snippets.content: Isolate skewed node, restart NTP, and verify nonce acceptance rate.

runbook_snippets.title: Attack lockdown
runbook_snippets.content: Enable strict lockout only if malicious IP concentration is confirmed.

timeline_notes.title: Base image rollout
timeline_notes.content: Node image rollout completed on auth-node-7 before drift began.

timeline_notes.title: Partner launch event
timeline_notes.content: Large partner launch added traffic but no auth protocol changes.

red_herrings: Bruteforce detector warns about failed logins but lacks concentrated malicious source pattern.
Cache latency increase is small and not tied to nonce-specific failures.
true_root_cause: Clock skew on auth node caused OAuth nonce validation failures
true_root_cause_aliases: ntp drift on auth node invalidated nonce window
time sync failure triggered nonce mismatches
true_mitigation: Isolate skewed node, restore NTP sync, and return node after validation
true_mitigation_aliases: remove drifted auth node and fix ntp
restart time sync service and recover nonce checks
